appliedUpdates.description: Added M2-specific Flow Validator Guidance sections for API Endpoints and Browser UI, including test fixture details, upload response shape, key endpoints, and isolation rules for M2 upload mutations.
Created test audio fixtures inside Docker container at /app/data/test-fixtures/ with 7 supported formats, corrupt files, unsupported files, and special-character filename files.

notes.VAL-INTAKE-007: Corrupt files with valid extensions are accepted at upload time (201). Failure occurs during ffmpeg normalization when a worker processes the job. This is expected behavior per the validation contract.
notes.VAL-INTAKE-022: _parse_bool is intentionally lenient — 'maybe' defaults to False rather than returning 422. This is a design choice, not a bug. Non-file values in files[] correctly return 422.
notes.VAL-INTAKE-008: Native drag-and-drop cannot be fully simulated via agent-browser (Playwright limitation). Verified DOM elements, event handlers (e.preventDefault/stopPropagation), DropOverlay component at layout level, and source code instead.
notes.VAL-CROSS-012: DropOverlay verified on home page and settings page. Editor page not tested (no completed memos). Source code confirms DropOverlay is in +layout.svelte, so it is active on all pages.
